---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product, API, adapter, or documentation improvement
title: '[feature] '
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what is missing today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the shape of the feature you want. API sketches and examples are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternative approaches did you evaluate?

## Surface area

- [ ] API
- [ ] Worker
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] SDK
- [ ] MCP
- [ ] Adapter
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Template / example

## User impact

Who benefits from this, and how would it improve their workflow?

## Docs and rollout notes

- [ ] README likely needs an update
- [ ] `docs/` likely needs an update
- [ ] Example code should be added or refreshed
- [ ] No documentation impact
